rationale.R1.5: Each paragraph restates its core idea two or three times in successive sentences (e.g., the classifier-aggregation point appears three times in paragraph 3); eliminating this structural redundancy requires reorganizing information flow within and across paragraphs, not merely copyediting individual sentences.
